untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle is a visual chart pattern requiring identification of: (1) U-shaped/dome-shaped cup formation, (2) handle formation at right cup rim, and (3) measured target computation (handle height subtracted from breakout point). These require pattern recognition algorithms or multi-bar formation analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also lacks explicit stop-loss placement rules (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Target success rate of 47% cannot be encoded as a condition. Volume trend conditions are qualitative descriptors rather than quantifiable thresholds.
translation_notes: This is a pattern-based signal that requires visual/morphological analysis of price structure over multiple bars. The allowed indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, etc.) are insufficient to programmatically detect cup formations, handle geometry, or measure pattern dimensions. A proper implementation would require: (1) a dedicated cup-and-handle pattern recognition function, (2) explicit bar-range definitions for cup/handle identification, or (3) clustering/shape-matching algorithms. The entry condition provided (close > prev_high) is only a generic breakout stub and does not capture the nuanced pattern requirements. Recommend implementing this signal using a specialized pattern library or custom pattern detection module outside this rules engine.
